metadata.seed: I sometimes ask these questions. What’s the point in living? Is it just a distraction from death? Once we die, that’s it. We’re all alone after that. Whats the point in working so hard at life u know? How come I can’t have friends and have a normal teenage life like everyone else at school? Why do i have to resort to asking these questions at 15 yrs old? Is it because I’m lonely and have nothing else to do? Who am I? What is my purpose?

patient.query: I sometimes ask these questions. What’s the point in living? Is it just a distraction from death? Once we die, that’s it. We’re all alone after that. Whats the point in working so hard at life u know? How come I can’t have friends and have a normal teenage life like everyone else at school? Why do i have to resort to asking these questions at 15 yrs old? Is it because I’m lonely and have nothing else to do? Who am I? What is my purpose?

automatic_thoughts: Is it just a distraction from death?
What’s the point in working so hard at life?
How come I can’t have friends?
Why do I have to resort to asking these questions?

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're feeling very alone and questioning the purpose of life and your place in it. What has been happening lately that brings these thoughts to the surface?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like you're feeling very alone and questioning the purpose of life and your place in it. What has been happening lately that brings these thoughts to the surface?

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds like you're feeling very alone and questioning the meaning of life. What evidence do you have that life has no point, and what evidence might suggest otherwise?

alternative_perspective.response: It can feel overwhelming, but a trusted friend might point out that even small moments can give life meaning. What do you think a close friend would say if they heard you ask these questions?

safety_check.response: It sounds like you’re feeling really overwhelmed and alone right now. When you said those thoughts, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
